assertions.text: Agent runs xcrun simctl help and maestro --version before any simulator command
Agent lists available simulator devices with xcrun simctl list devices
Agent uses UDID (not device name) when booting the simulator
Agent reports device name, iOS version, and UDID at the start
Agent captures a screenshot using xcrun simctl io booted screenshot
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report matching the Output Format template (Environment, Actions Performed, Screenshots, Issues Found sections)
Agent asks user whether to shut down or keep the simulator running at the end
